{{CargoClone
|name=God of Fortune
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=176
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Gaia Cabin Output +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Mecha Minion Skin HP +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Mecha Minion Skin HP +50%
|}}
